---
title: "Metatranscriptomics and Metagenomics Integration"
author: "Alexis Felipe Rojas Cruz"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: cerulean  
    highlight: tango
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  fig.keep = 'all'
)
```

# 1. Install and Load Required Packages

```{r include=FALSE, comment = ""}
# Define packages and their sources
bioc_packages <- c("ComplexHeatmap")
cran_packages <- c("RColorBrewer", "tidyverse", "ggplot2", "ggrepel", "pheatmap", "readr", "ggvenn", "circlize", "networkD3", "webshot2", "htmlwidgets")

# Install Bioconductor packages
missing_bioc <- bioc_packages[!bioc_packages %in% rownames(installed.packages())]
if (length(missing_bioc) > 0) {
  if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE)) {
    install.packages("BiocManager")
  }
  BiocManager::install(missing_bioc)
}

# Install CRAN packages
missing_cran <- cran_packages[!cran_packages %in% rownames(installed.packages())]
if (length(missing_cran) > 0) {
  install.packages(missing_cran)
}

# Load all libraries
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(tidyverse)
library(pheatmap)
library(ggrepel)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(readr)
library(ggvenn)
library(circlize)
library(networkD3)
library(webshot2)
library(htmlwidgets)
```

## - Loading palettes

In this section, we load additional color palettes and define some custom ones.

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Load additional colour palette packages
library(unikn, quietly = TRUE)
library(RColorBrewer, quietly = TRUE)
library(yarrr, quietly = TRUE)
library(scales, quietly = TRUE)
library(ggsci, quietly = TRUE)

# Define a set of custom color palettes from the unikn package
mix_1 <- usecol(pal = c(Karpfenblau, "white", Peach), n = 15)
mix_2 <- usecol(pal = c(rev(pal_seeblau), "white", pal_pinky))
mix_3 <- usecol(pal = c(rev(pal_bordeaux), "white", pal_petrol), n = 15)

# Display the custom palettes
seecol(list(mix_1, mix_2, mix_3), col_brd = "white", lwd_brd = 4, title = "Comparing palettes mixed from unikn colors", pal_names = c("mix_1", "mix_2", "mix_3"))

# Define a second set of custom palettes from the RColorBrewer and yarrr packages
brew_mix <- usecol(c(rev(brewer.pal(n = 4, name = "Reds")), "white", brewer.pal(n = 4, name = "Blues")), n = 13)
brew_ext <- usecol(brewer.pal(n = 11, name = "Spectral"), n = 12)
yarrr_mix <- usecol(c(piratepal("nemo"), piratepal("bugs")))
yarrr_mod <- usecol(c(piratepal("ipod")), n = 9)

# Display the second set of custom palettes
seecol(pal = list(brew_mix, brew_ext, yarrr_mix, yarrr_mod), col_brd = "white", lwd_brd = 2, title = "Using usecol() and seecol() to mix and modify palettes", pal_names = c("brew_mix", "brew_ext", "yarrr_mix", "yarrr_mod"))

# Define additional custom palettes from the scales package
natjournals_palette <- pal_npg("nrc")(10)
```

# 1. Select genus-level matches only


```{r load-data}
# This file contains all significant taxa/features identified by ANCOM-BC in EUR and LATAM
ancom <- read.csv("./Data/All_significant_features.csv", header = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# This file contains differential expression results comparing PD vs Healthy.
DEGs <- read.csv("./Data/PDvsH_results.csv", header = TRUE, sep = ",", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# Check how many entries each dataset has
cat("ANCOM-BC results:", nrow(ancom), "rows\n")
cat("DESeq2 results:", nrow(DEGs), "rows\n")

```


```{r MAG-final}

# Define rank order (most specific first)
rank_order <- c("Species", "Genus", "Family", "Order", "Class", "Phylum", "Kingdom")


MAGs_final <- DEGs %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    TaxonLabel = {
      ranks <- c(Species, Genus, Family, Order, Class, Phylum, Kingdom)
      names(ranks) <- rank_order
      ranks <- ranks[!is.na(ranks) & ranks != ""]
      matched <- ranks[ranks %in% ancom$TaxonLabel]
      if (length(matched) > 0) matched[1] else NA_character_
    },
    MatchRank = {
      ranks <- c(Species, Genus, Family, Order, Class, Phylum, Kingdom)
      names(ranks) <- rank_order
      ranks <- ranks[!is.na(ranks) & ranks != ""]
      matched_rank <- names(ranks)[ranks %in% ancom$TaxonLabel]
      if (length(matched_rank) > 0) matched_rank[1] else NA_character_
    }
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!is.na(TaxonLabel)) %>%
  left_join(ancom, by = "TaxonLabel", suffix = c(".MAG", ".ASV")) %>%
  filter(
    (regulation == "Upregulated" & Group == "PD") |
    (regulation == "Downregulated" & Group == "Healthy")
  )
```

```{r MAG-genus}

MAGs_genus <- MAGs_final %>%
  filter(MatchRank == "Genus")

# Extract DEGs taxonomy columns for PD group
MAGs_PD <- MAGs_genus %>%
  filter(Group == "PD")

# Extract DEGs taxonomy columns for Healthy group
MAGs_Healthy <- MAGs_genus %>%
  filter(Group == "Healthy") 

# Save them as CSV files
write.csv(MAGs_genus, "./MAGs_final/MAGs_genus.csv", quote = TRUE, row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(MAGs_PD, "./MAGs_final/MAGs_PD_taxa.csv", quote = TRUE, row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(MAGs_Healthy, "./MAGs_final/MAGs_Healthy_taxa.csv", quote = TRUE, row.names = FALSE)
```

# Sankey plot

```{r load-data}

# Loading MAGs for PD and Healthy

MAGs_PD <- read.csv("./MAGs_final/MAGs_PD_taxa.csv", header = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

MAGs_Healthy <- read.csv("./MAGs_final/MAGs_Healthy_taxa.csv", header = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

```

# PD

```{r sankey-data}

# Clean MAG taxonomy table
Sankey_PD <- MAGs_PD %>%
  select(MAG_gene, ends_with(".MAG"), -classification.MAG, -Kingdom.MAG) %>%
  mutate(across(ends_with(".MAG"), ~ gsub("^[a-z]__", "", .))) %>%
  rename_with(~ gsub("\\.MAG$", "", .)) %>%
  mutate(across(c(Phylum, Class, Order, Family, Genus, Species),
                ~ na_if(., ""))) %>%
  group_by(MAG_gene) %>%
  mutate(row_num = row_number()) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    MAG_gene = if_else(
      row_num == 1,
      MAG_gene,
      paste0(MAG_gene, ".", letters[(row_num - 2) %% length(letters) + 1])
    )
  ) %>%
  select(-row_num) %>%
  arrange(MAG_gene) %>%
  separate(
    MAG_gene,
    into = c("Prefix", "MAG", "Gene"),
    sep = "__",
    remove = TRUE,
    extra = "merge",
    fill = "right"
  ) %>%
  select(-Prefix, -MAG)

```

```{r sankey-links}

# Define taxonomy hierarchy
tax_levels <- c("Phylum", "Class", "Order",
                "Family", "Genus", "Species")

# Build taxonomic connections weighted by gene counts
Sankey_links <- Sankey_PD %>%
  select(Gene, Phylum, Class, Order, Family, Genus, Species) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  mutate(row_id = row_number()) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = tax_levels,
    names_to = "level",
    values_to = "node"
  ) %>%
  mutate(level = factor(level, levels = tax_levels)) %>%
  arrange(row_id, level) %>%
  group_by(row_id) %>%
  mutate(
    next_node = lead(node),
    Phylum_link = first(node[level == "Phylum"])
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!is.na(next_node)) %>%
  count(Phylum_link, node, next_node, name = "value") %>%
  rename(
    source = node,
    target = next_node
  )


```

```{r sankey-nodes}
# Build nodes
Sankey_nodes <- data.frame(
  name = unique(c(Sankey_links$source, Sankey_links$target)),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Assign node levels by taxonomy hierarchy
Sankey_nodes <- Sankey_nodes %>%
  mutate(Level = case_when(
    name %in% Sankey_PD$Phylum  ~ "Phylum",
    name %in% Sankey_PD$Class   ~ "Class",
    name %in% Sankey_PD$Order   ~ "Order",
    name %in% Sankey_PD$Family  ~ "Family",
    name %in% Sankey_PD$Genus   ~ "Genus",
    name %in% Sankey_PD$Species ~ "Species",
    TRUE ~ "Other"
  ))

# Arrange nodes by hierarchy order
Sankey_nodes <- Sankey_nodes %>%
  mutate(Level = factor(
    Level,
    levels = c("Phylum", "Class", "Order", "Family", "Genus", "Species")
  )) %>%
  arrange(Level)

# Add numeric IDs after arranging
Sankey_nodes <- Sankey_nodes %>%
  mutate(nodeID = row_number() - 1)

Sankey_links <- Sankey_links %>%
  mutate(
    IDsource = match(source, Sankey_nodes$name) - 1,
    IDtarget = match(target, Sankey_nodes$name) - 1
  )

```

```{r sankey-plot, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

# Node colors by taxonomic level
level_colors <- c(
  Phylum  = pal_npg("nrc")(10)[1],
  Class   = pal_npg("nrc")(10)[2],
  Order   = pal_npg("nrc")(10)[3],
  Family  = pal_npg("nrc")(10)[4],
  Genus   = pal_npg("nrc")(10)[5],
  Species = pal_npg("nrc")(10)[6]
)

# Link colors by Phylum
base_palette <- c(
  "#0072B2",  # blue
  "#D55E00",  # vermillion
  "#009E73",  # green
  "#CC79A7",  # magenta
  "#F0E442",  # yellow
  "#56B4E9",  # sky blue
  "#E69F00",  # orange
  "#000000"   # black
)

phyla <- unique(Sankey_links$Phylum_link)
n_phy <- length(phyla)

phyla_palette <- if (n_phy <= length(base_palette)) {
  base_palette[1:n_phy]
} else {
  colorRampPalette(base_palette)(n_phy)
}

# Prepare JS domains and ranges

phylum_domain <- paste0('"', phyla, '"', collapse = ",")
phylum_range  <- paste0('"', phyla_palette, '"', collapse = ",")

level_domain <- paste0('"', names(level_colors), '"', collapse = ",")
level_range  <- paste0('"', level_colors, '"', collapse = ",")
```

```{r sankey-plot, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

# -----------------------------
# 1. Create Sankey network
# -----------------------------
sankey_plot <- sankeyNetwork(
  Links = Sankey_links,
  Nodes = Sankey_nodes,
  Source = "IDsource",
  Target = "IDtarget",
  Value  = "value",
  NodeID = "name",
  NodeGroup = "Level",
  LinkGroup = "Phylum_link",
  fontSize = 14,
  nodeWidth = 22
)

# -----------------------------
# 2. Apply custom coloring via JS
# -----------------------------
sankey_plot <- htmlwidgets::onRender(
  sankey_plot,
  sprintf(
    '
    function(el, x) {
    
       // Force Helvetica font
      d3.select(el)
        .style("font-family", "Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif");

      // Node color scale (by Level)
      var levelColors = d3.scaleOrdinal()
        .domain([%s])
        .range([%s]);

      // Link color scale (by Phylum_link)
      var magColors = d3.scaleOrdinal()
        .domain([%s])
        .range([%s]);

      // Apply node colors
      d3.select(el).selectAll(".node rect")
        .style("fill", function(d) {
          return levelColors(d.group);
        });

      // Apply link colors
      d3.select(el).selectAll(".link")
        .style("stroke", function(d) {
          return magColors(d.group);
        })
        .style("stroke-opacity", 0.2);
    }
    ',
    level_domain, level_range,
    phylum_domain, phylum_range
  )
)

# -----------------------------
# 3. Display
# -----------------------------
sankey_plot

# Save as HTML
saveWidget(sankey_plot, "./Sankey/PD_sankey.html", selfcontained = TRUE)

# Horizontal layout: width > height

webshot2::webshot(
  url = "./Sankey/PD_sankey.html",
  file = "./Sankey/PD_sankey.pdf",
  vwidth = 1500,
  vheight = 600,
  cliprect = "viewport"
)
```


# Healthy

```{r sankey-data}

# Clean MAG taxonomy table
Sankey_Healthy <- MAGs_Healthy %>%
  select(MAG_gene, ends_with(".MAG"), -classification.MAG, -Kingdom.MAG) %>%
  mutate(across(ends_with(".MAG"), ~ gsub("^[a-z]__", "", .))) %>%
  rename_with(~ gsub("\\.MAG$", "", .)) %>%
  mutate(across(c(Phylum, Class, Order, Family, Genus, Species),
                ~ na_if(., ""))) %>%
  group_by(MAG_gene) %>%
  mutate(row_num = row_number()) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    MAG_gene = if_else(
      row_num == 1,
      MAG_gene,
      paste0(MAG_gene, ".", letters[(row_num - 2) %% length(letters) + 1])
    )
  ) %>%
  select(-row_num) %>%
  arrange(MAG_gene) %>%
  separate(
    MAG_gene,
    into = c("Prefix", "MAG", "Gene"),
    sep = "__",
    remove = TRUE,
    extra = "merge",
    fill = "right"
  ) %>%
  select(-Prefix, -MAG)

```

```{r sankey-links}

# Define taxonomy hierarchy
tax_levels <- c("Phylum", "Class", "Order",
                "Family", "Genus", "Species")

# Build taxonomic connections weighted by gene counts
Sankey_links <- Sankey_Healthy %>%
  select(Gene, Phylum, Class, Order, Family, Genus, Species) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  mutate(row_id = row_number()) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = tax_levels,
    names_to = "level",
    values_to = "node"
  ) %>%
  mutate(level = factor(level, levels = tax_levels)) %>%
  arrange(row_id, level) %>%
  group_by(row_id) %>%
  mutate(
    next_node = lead(node),
    Phylum_link = first(node[level == "Phylum"])
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!is.na(next_node)) %>%
  count(Phylum_link, node, next_node, name = "value") %>%
  rename(
    source = node,
    target = next_node
  )


```

```{r sankey-nodes}
# Build nodes
Sankey_nodes <- data.frame(
  name = unique(c(Sankey_links$source, Sankey_links$target)),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Assign node levels by taxonomy hierarchy
Sankey_nodes <- Sankey_nodes %>%
  mutate(Level = case_when(
    name %in% Sankey_PD$Phylum  ~ "Phylum",
    name %in% Sankey_PD$Class   ~ "Class",
    name %in% Sankey_PD$Order   ~ "Order",
    name %in% Sankey_PD$Family  ~ "Family",
    name %in% Sankey_PD$Genus   ~ "Genus",
    name %in% Sankey_PD$Species ~ "Species",
    TRUE ~ "Other"
  ))

# Arrange nodes by hierarchy order
Sankey_nodes <- Sankey_nodes %>%
  mutate(Level = factor(
    Level,
    levels = c("Phylum", "Class", "Order", "Family", "Genus", "Species")
  )) %>%
  arrange(Level)

# Add numeric IDs after arranging
Sankey_nodes <- Sankey_nodes %>%
  mutate(nodeID = row_number() - 1)

Sankey_links <- Sankey_links %>%
  mutate(
    IDsource = match(source, Sankey_nodes$name) - 1,
    IDtarget = match(target, Sankey_nodes$name) - 1
  )

```

```{r sankey-plot, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

# Node colors by taxonomic level
level_colors <- c(
  Phylum  = pal_npg("nrc")(10)[1],
  Class   = pal_npg("nrc")(10)[2],
  Order   = pal_npg("nrc")(10)[3],
  Family  = pal_npg("nrc")(10)[4],
  Genus   = pal_npg("nrc")(10)[5],
  Species = pal_npg("nrc")(10)[6]
)

# Link colors by Phylum
base_palette <- c(
  "#0072B2",  # blue
  "#D55E00",  # vermillion
  "#009E73",  # green
  "#CC79A7",  # magenta
  "#F0E442",  # yellow
  "#56B4E9",  # sky blue
  "#E69F00",  # orange
  "#000000"   # black
)

phyla <- unique(Sankey_links$Phylum_link)
n_phy <- length(phyla)

phyla_palette <- if (n_phy <= length(base_palette)) {
  base_palette[1:n_phy]
} else {
  colorRampPalette(base_palette)(n_phy)
}

# Prepare JS domains and ranges

phylum_domain <- paste0('"', phyla, '"', collapse = ",")
phylum_range  <- paste0('"', phyla_palette, '"', collapse = ",")

level_domain <- paste0('"', names(level_colors), '"', collapse = ",")
level_range  <- paste0('"', level_colors, '"', collapse = ",")
```

```{r sankey-plot, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

# -----------------------------
# 1. Create Sankey network
# -----------------------------
sankey_plot <- sankeyNetwork(
  Links = Sankey_links,
  Nodes = Sankey_nodes,
  Source = "IDsource",
  Target = "IDtarget",
  Value  = "value",
  NodeID = "name",
  NodeGroup = "Level",
  LinkGroup = "Phylum_link",
  fontSize = 14,
  nodeWidth = 22
)

# -----------------------------
# 2. Apply custom coloring via JS
# -----------------------------
sankey_plot <- htmlwidgets::onRender(
  sankey_plot,
  sprintf(
    '
    function(el, x) {
    
       // Force Helvetica font
      d3.select(el)
        .style("font-family", "Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif");

      // Node color scale (by Level)
      var levelColors = d3.scaleOrdinal()
        .domain([%s])
        .range([%s]);

      // Link color scale (by Phylum_link)
      var magColors = d3.scaleOrdinal()
        .domain([%s])
        .range([%s]);

      // Apply node colors
      d3.select(el).selectAll(".node rect")
        .style("fill", function(d) {
          return levelColors(d.group);
        });

      // Apply link colors
      d3.select(el).selectAll(".link")
        .style("stroke", function(d) {
          return magColors(d.group);
        })
        .style("stroke-opacity", 0.2);
    }
    ',
    level_domain, level_range,
    phylum_domain, phylum_range
  )
)

# -----------------------------
# 3. Display
# -----------------------------
sankey_plot

# Save as HTML
saveWidget(sankey_plot, "./Sankey/Healthy_sankey.html", selfcontained = TRUE)

# Horizontal layout: width > height

webshot2::webshot(
  url = "./Sankey/Healthy_sankey.html",
  file = "./Sankey/Healthy_sankey.pdf",
  vwidth = 1500,
  vheight = 300,
  cliprect = "viewport"
)
```

# Session information

```{r, session-information}
sessionInfo()
```
